'''chanongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylonate|xylonate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylonate|xylonate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chanongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chænengeth|chænengeth]] || [[word:chænengej|chænengej]] || [[word:chænengesh|chænengesh]] || [[word:chænenge|chænenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chanonongoth|chanonongoth]] || [[word:chanonongoj|chanonongoj]] || [[word:chanonongosh|chanonongosh]] || [[word:chanonongo|chanonongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chanongoth|chanongoth]] || [[word:chanongoj|chanongoj]] || [[word:chanongosh|chanongosh]] || [[word:chanongo|chanongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chanofngoth|chanofngoth]] || [[word:chanofngoj|chanofngoj]] || [[word:chanofngosh|chanofngosh]] || [[word:chanofngof|chanofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chanongotho|chanongotho]] || [[word:chanongojo|chanongojo]] || [[word:chanongosho|chanongosho]] || [[word:chanongoko|chanongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chanongoth|chanongoth]] || [[word:chanongoj|chanongoj]] || [[word:chanongosh|chanongosh]] || [[word:chanongo|chanongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chanongothol|chanongothol]] || [[word:chanongojol|chanongojol]] || [[word:chanongoshol|chanongoshol]] || [[word:chanongokol|chanongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chanongothotho|chanongothotho]] || [[word:chanongojojo|chanongojojo]] || [[word:chanongoshosho|chanongoshosho]] || [[word:chanongoko|chanongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chanongothon|chanongothon]] || [[word:chanongojon|chanongojon]] || [[word:chanongoshon|chanongoshon]] || [[word:chanongokon|chanongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chanongothoro|chanongothoro]] || [[word:chanongojoro|chanongojoro]] || [[word:chanongoshoro|chanongoshoro]] || [[word:chanongokoro|chanongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
